meta.name: Low Profile Universal Stopper®
meta.description: Low-profile protective enclosure for call points, push buttons and key switches
meta.heroTitle: Low-Profile IP54 Protective Enclosure with Optional LED Sounder
meta.heroDescription:
Low-profile polycarbonate enclosure for manual call points, push buttons and key switches. IP54-rated configurations provide protection against dust ingress and water splashes.

Available with optional LED sounder and marked hood. Supports flush, surface and coloured spacer mounting configurations.

Intended for indoor and outdoor installations requiring protection against misuse, impact or accidental activation.

options.1: #1 Surface mount with transparent spacer (Dual Mount)
